backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a guestbook backend with user profiles, guestbook entries (add/update/delete/query), and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—renaming 'Favorite AT Location' label and fixing the 'Actor not available' error—to their affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, recent changes, and relationships within the VTH Guest Book application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark modes used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the page title 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker', VTH favicon, and Leaflet CSS/JS loaded via CDN.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for feed, add entry, entry detail, world map, and AT map pages, wrapped in QueryClientProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutDialog.tsx: Modal dialog describing the VTH Guest Book project, its community purpose, and its Internet Computer blockchain foundation, with the VTH avatar prominently displayed.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout component providing a sticky header with VTH branding and logout button, a main content outlet, and a fixed bottom navigation bar with Feed, Sign, World, and Trail Map tabs.
frontend/src/components/CreateAccountDia: A dialog component that explains Internet Identity authentication and provides a login button for creating or accessing an account on the VTH Guest Book app.
A dialog form component that allows authenticated users to edit an existing guestbook entry, including name, trail name, comment, current location, and favorite place fields.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A hamburger menu component that toggles a dropdown with links to open the About, Create Account/Login, and How to Use dialogs.
frontend/src/components/HowToUseDialog.t: A dialog component that displays step-by-step instructions for using the VTH Guest Book app, covering signing entries, pinning locations, exploring maps, and browsing the feed.
frontend/src/components/MapLegend.tsx: A small card component that displays a legend hint instructing users to tap a map pin to view the associated guestbook entry.
frontend/src/components/MapPin.tsx: A button component that renders an SVG map pin marker, with visual styling that changes when the pin is selected.
frontend/src/components/PlaceSearchField: A form field component that lets users search for a geographic location by name using a geocoding API, with support for selecting from multiple results.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer backend actor using the current Internet Identity, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating guestbook data (entries, user profile, admin status) via the ICP actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS with a warm earthy OKLCH color palette, defining CSS custom properties for light/dark modes, logo tokens, scrollbar styling, and touch-friendly sizing.
frontend/src/lib/geocoding.ts: Utility that queries the OpenStreetMap Nominatim API to search for places by name and returns normalized results with display name and coordinates.
frontend/src/lib/guestbookFormat.ts: Formatting helpers for guestbook data including principal abbreviation, nanosecond timestamp formatting, coordinate display, and encoding/decoding of embedded place name tags in comments.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddEntryPage.tsx: Form page for authenticated users to submit a new guestbook entry with optional name, trail name, comment, current location (GPS or search), and favorite place, encoding location data into the comment field before submission.
frontend/src/pages/ATMapPage.tsx: Renders an interactive Leaflet map displaying custom pin markers for guestbook entries that have a favorite place location, fitting the map bounds to all markers.
frontend/src/pages/EntryDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single guestbook entry's full details (author, trail, comment, location) fetched by timestamp URL param, with edit and delete controls visible to the entry owner or admin.
frontend/src/pages/GuestbookFeedPage.tsx: Renders a reverse-chronological list of all guestbook entries with preview text, location badges, and per-entry edit/delete actions for owners and admins.
frontend/src/pages/WorldMapPage.tsx: Renders an interactive Leaflet map (loaded via CDN) that plots custom pin markers for all guestbook entries that have a current location, with popup cards showing author and comment preview.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, card, logo, chart, etc.), extended border radii, font families, box shadows, and accordion/fade-in keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the Vicarious Thru-Hikers project state at version 3, listing two open fix requests: renaming the 'Favorite AT Location' label and resolving the 'Actor not available' error when adding a location.
